title: The Wealth of Nations
author: Adam Smith
content: “The division of labour... is the great cause of the increase of public opulence.”
action: Record: Quantifying the efficiency gains of specialization while noting the resulting dependency on the broader system.

title: Small Is Beautiful
author: E.F. Schumacher
content: “Any intelligent fool can make things bigger, more complex, and more violent. It takes a touch of genius—and a lot of courage—to move in the opposite direction.”
action: Record: The strategic value of reducing complexity to lower the risk of systemic failure.

title: Skin in the Game
author: Nassim Nicholas Taleb
content: “You cannot make a decision for someone else if you do not bear the consequences.”
action: Record: The absolute requirement for incentive alignment between decision-maker and the system impacted by those decisions.

title: The Theory of the Leisure Class
author: Thorstein Veblen
content: “Conspicuous consumption... serves as a signal of high-level system capability.”
action: Record: Identifying performative metrics as proxies for status or power within a hierarchy.

title: Basic Economics
author: Thomas Sowell
action: Record: Removing moral preference from analysis and focusing solely on the net cost-benefit outcome of every action.
